h4657f699gf559g4e3bg8930g6f6f996ba219: I was watching you at the grove gate. You spilled enough goblin blood to fill the Chionthar.
ha4ba7dafgb5ddg42cag87a6gd55bb8808c76: Where'd you learn moves like that?
ha18599e5g508bg440bg9abcg72bea9e49434: Nowhere, really. It's always come naturally.
h5d6aa037g67a5g448ag8e2eg3b75684cca09: I better keep a close eye on you, then - might pick up a few new techniques.
h24474318g2181g4a94gaa01gc59bf8c07e99: The Blade's not often keen on sharing his glory. But if he has to, better it be with a champ like you.
h676ce5edgdd6fg4ee9ga981g2ea020239bd1: It took years of discipline to form the champion standing before you.
hb87ebe3bg7864g4bd8gb6cag38bd19b52b61: Seems the hard work paid off! You'd turn the head of Balduran himself, if he weren't quite so dead.
hcb352616gdafdg416fgb2abg149c91d953be: If someone must share in the Blade's glory, better it be a champ like you.
h0f8b390cg8186g438fga02dgcc16e38f3831: I've been around - and picked up a trick or two along the way.
h6f362d47g7c57g4c9dgbc28gf15a901aac77: That much is apparent! Perhaps we might compare notes, brush up on the basics.
h40f6a455gfef9g42ffgbca1g56da8ad89ac6: No special training, I'm just enthusiastic.
h039cfb53ga5b9g4726g9c84g7abd16deffd1: A pup with a bone is enthusiastic. No - there's something about you. Something I can't quite bite into...
h717e08a4gd944g43c4g823cgd4c78f1cf512: A pup with a bone is enthusiastic. No - you're no ordinary vampire spawn. I mean, not that that's an ordinary thing to... well... forget it.
h1ee4eeb1gd302g41eaga74eg9950f3ccbede: Instinct. Cultists bring out the worst in me.
hc7b1a195g166eg49cdg83a8gc0768368bb8b: You and me both. Something tells me you've got stories to tell.
ha7e291deg03ffg4d28g9b30g651e2b5381a5: Is that right? I thought I'd caught a whiff of cinder on you.
h6218c728g5255g44dag8e62gdff914246309: Well, no matter. One training ground's good as another. If I must share the glory, better it be with a champ like you.
h817ff29fg0cb6g4ce8g9528g9062048bce34: Your wit is as quick as your fingers. Did that sound indecent? I sure hope so.
ha3f1731fgfe31g46b9gac3dg6e66652f682f: Nowhere you'd know. Let's just call it luck.
hbdce8308g084cg4988gb53egf1551b5c6846: Let's hope it doesn't run out any time soon, eh?
hfdefc75eg1101g47cdga925g9c8a8f7a4570: You've got talent. If the Blade must share his glory, better it be with a champ like you.
h33cc18e5g52d9g4bcegbef5g653ea97f5792: What about you? How did you become the 'Blade of Frontiers'?
hcac90371g42e3g4e73gba16g9fae4698612e: Was a time I didn't amount to much. But then, er, a higher purpose called to me.
h0f8596ebg73aeg4c6cg967ag11ef05dd8712: Killed a few goblins, freed a few captives, and I was hooked. The only life I want is a hero's.
hee7cfb55ga25cg4991gababg3cb3663dc94e: Now let's get some rest. I do my best goblin-killing at sunup.
h0bc98dbcg7d7ag4469g911fg55aec7e61318: You weren't bad either. We'll make quite the pair in battle.
hda870f9eg528bg4286g9c92g4ed20948ce35: Then let the forests part and the rivers still. Legends approach!
h4856b9a1gdc79g40b2g983cg567373825ad6: I'm not sharing in your glory. You're sharing in mine.
h727c4ab6g5342g48c1g8700gf9f79ba65534: A matter for the bards and poets to settle. I reckon both our names will fall from their lips!
hcc4ed9f2g58f4g4decgb3f5g23490d530c07: A matter for the bards and poets to settle. And I've not heard your name fall from their lips.
h37c3e925g6e3eg49d3gb74ageaf85eeb3db4: No love for goblins, I see. Care to share?
hffea7ae8gcd5fg4569gbf75gc72efafe78c2: The missing eye? Goblin work there. The roach carved it out, couldn't stop cackling.
hd60e3766gfb03g43f0g8e31g0cfcde3ccbde: But I'll be getting the last laugh, just you wait.
h80865450g6edag47aag889fgbbed5e5f37da: The great Queen Vlaakith instills her children with might.
hbd3f2384gd61dg4099g8139gae8076bc92fa: A queen? I'd hardly doubt it - you were swift as sun and bright as wind. Or did I get that backward?
hc0fcec34gc94fg4309gba04g9c1fd24aaf2b: Pure instinct. The heart of a warrior beats within me.
hac6b1a37g4521g46f1gb82bg3fe5fa02106e: Instinct? Ah, if only I'd been so blessed. The Blade was not born so much as made.
h896a0e3cgec84g4930ga333g61f89d471d0d: You've got talent, sure enough. If I must share the glory, better it be with a champ like you.
h5d23cccag6880g4bccgb9b4gb8efaac1fa35: When your own clanmates would stab you in the back, you learn to protect it.
hd9b6397fg98dag4d97ga52dg0fec34ff522e: And here I thought paranoia didn't have an upside.
hc555ce8ag3e89g46b9gb23ag423bdd8f9d4f: One does not survive the Underdark without a talent for battle.
h05f70e83gf4b8g4891gb2adg0a2ec7b2ee85: Or a knack for seeing in the dark, for that matter. Handy for all those caves we'll definitely, absolutely be roaming.
h67d06f81g5dc6g40edg90fagc9eea6bab6de: Githyanki train for battle from the moment they hatch.
hc4bc6118g8657g4081g8de0gdbe7264c0da5: I'd hardly doubt it - you were swift as sun and bright as wind. Or did I get that backward?
h7d851689g0e2ag4a75gbe5fgc518ef9babff: I studied for years to learn how to channel the Weave.
hd4ba77ecgc82cg4a0bgb2b6g9edf6c8f3e61: Years, huh? I never was the bookish type. Good thing I had someone to show me the ropes.
hafe0d99cg1870g4f78ga414g88973a404d9a: I am fueled by my rage. The mere scent of blood unleashes the animal within me.
heced5259g3629g42c2g9076g9004d21656c8: Whoa there, chief - might need to jam a cork in that bottle before it flows over.
ha87ded2eg3432g460dg839eg20dcd0f95059: But I reckon if someone must share in the Blade's glory, better it be a brute like you.
h902f5badgcce1g4c2fga8c4g5fec309c038d: I just wave my hands and hope for the best.
hb00da9f9g680cg4139g9310gaf557738a7e1: All that flash comes natural, does it? Careful you don't go sticking those hands where they're not invited. No telling what you might zap.
hba2b2e5bg3b7dg4991gba19g0a1257d8f381: Inborn talent. It's all in the rhythm.
ha6d6f16dg25ffg4262g9216g2a98e9cd993a: Rhythm, eh? I'll be keeping an eye on you, maybe learn a few moves. Not that I've heard any complaints.
h842f17ddg57f2g4fd7ga592g26bc892e2c16: My might is a blessing from the Outer Planes.
h7c590828gcfe7g47bcg8e96gaa093bf4519e: Your gift is near blinding. Your deity must have blessed you twice over.
h2bde8b8dg5942g4230g920bg1ff3860d4702: Nature itself imbues me with its power.
h499b6ab6gcc91g41cega6f7ge694e2185070: You really blossomed out there, took the battle by storm. It looked like a breeze!
h09182816ge832g49f0g8e33g1d3e23737c40: Life in the wilderness molded me into a warrior.
h6f84948eg3151g4a93ga97fg28e36296eb5c: The frontier is a hostile host. I've spent many a year trying to tame it.
hd99b8869g0402g4a2fg9cc7gc3078360246c: I swore an oath to my deity. In return, I bear his strength.
hfccb9bfcgbd4fg463dg9354g56f9c159624d: I swore an oath to my deity. In return, I bear her strength.
h94f15c4eg75b8g4611ga8a7gfe39b0dddfda: Ooh, I love a good mystery. One of the Shadow Thieves, maybe? Or the Fire Knives? The mind fairly boggles!
h04495a28gc28dg4931gbcfeg40eb3c5e2390: Ooh, I love a good mystery. One of the Shadow Thieves, maybe? Or the Fire Knives? Wait - do they even have those where you're from?
h45bd2715gf1bbg4d6dg9c3ag61fae28ab62f: My patron empowers me in return for my loyalty.
h5bed96f5g6062g40feg8f73g6c50824d6f55: Ay, yes. Loyalty. It seems a small price to pay for such might. Then the bill comes due...
ha76f3b81g07e1g48baga5fcgc37c1f98622c: I have made careful study of the ki.
h66bce17egbbd2g4d41gb5b5g5b954bbaa7df: Ki? Maybe you can show me a few tricks, give me a few pointers. I promise I won't show you up. Well - maybe a little.
